hero.tagline: Smart diagnostics for circuits. No guessing.
hero.subtitle: NEMIKI combines computer vision, real-time electrical monitoring and generative AI so any technician can diagnose PCBs in seconds.

problem.title: The problem
problem.headline: In Mexico, a production line stoppage costs up to $500K MXN per hour.
problem.context1: Mexican industries still operate with corrective maintenance: they wait for something to break before acting. Diagnosis depends on the technician's experience and instruments that only measure, not interpret.
problem.context2: NEMIKI changes that. It monitors, interprets and anticipates — before the failure occurs.

stat3.label: That combine vision + portable electrical monitoring

video.headline: A line stoppage costs thousands of dollars per hour
video.subtitle: Anticipate failures with us

step1.title: Connect the module
step1.desc: Connect the NEMIKI hardware to the circuit using precision pogo pin probes.

step2.title: Take a photo
step2.desc: ARGOS identifies components on-device without internet.

step3.title: Get the diagnosis
step3.desc: AI analyzes data and delivers contextual recommendations in seconds.

features.label: Capabilities
features.subtitle: Built-in from day one in every NEMIKI module.
features.title: Key features

f1.title: ARGOS Vision
f1.desc: On-device component detection without internet using YOLOv8n.

f2.title: Real-time monitoring
f2.desc: Continuous voltage, current, temperature and vibration.

f3.title: AI with real context
f3.desc: RAG: the LLM knows your specific circuit.

f5.title: Contextual chat
f5.desc: Ask about your circuit status in natural language.

kit.name: Direct Kit
features: NEMIKI hardware module (ESP32-S3 + industrial sensors + OLED + probes)
Mobile app included (ARGOS on-device, no internet needed)

about.label: About us
about.headline: The intelligent copilot for the industrial technician.
about.intro: We were born from the Mexican industry to solve its most costly problem: unplanned downtime.
about.philosophyText: NEMIKI comes from Nahuatl: "to walk together". We don't replace the technician — we walk alongside them. AI is the copilot; the technician is the pilot.
about.missionText: To empower industrial maintenance technicians with an intelligent copilot that combines real-time IoT monitoring, computer vision and generative AI to anticipate electronic failures before they occur.
about.visionText: To be the reference predictive maintenance platform in Latin America by 2030, transforming corrective maintenance into a digital competitive advantage for advanced manufacturing.
objectivesList: Reduce unplanned downtime in industrial plants through real-time predictive diagnostics.
Democratize predictive maintenance for Mexican industrial SMEs.
Integrate IoT, computer vision and generative AI into a unified tool.
Extend the lifespan of industrial electronic equipment and reduce e-waste.
Become the standard for electronic diagnostics in Mexico's industrial hubs.

footer.credit: Built by the NEMIKI team — InnovaTecNM 2026

faqItems.a: Yes, the NEMIKI app is included in all packages at no extra cost.
The ARGOS model runs on-device. Basic monitoring works offline; cloud features require internet.

faqItems.q: How long does hardware shipping take?
faqItems.a: Shipping across Mexico in 3-7 business days.

faqItems.q: Can I upgrade my plan later?
faqItems.a: Yes, you can migrate from Direct Kit to B2B Cloud at any time.
